content.en:
The existence of the peak of the Ninefold Ancestor is difficult to hit hard, but once it is really hit hard, it is also difficult to recover, and too many resources are needed.

Therefore, it is too costly!

The Nine-Story Building didn't understand, and the Nine-Fold Ancestors of the Ten Mountains and other forces didn't understand either, and they were all very confused.

Now.

All of the Sevenfold Ancestors have come out of the Growing Nest.

After all, if something big happens, and it will be the end of it!

And Ye Tian naturally came out.

......

Soon, many Ninefold Origin Ancestors of the Ninefold Building and other forces came, among which there were many existences at the peak of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, and these Ninefold Origin Ancestor peak powerhouses were even stronger than the Arhat Dao Ancestor, and they were also the real pillars of the major forces.

If it was before, there was no need to alarm them with a mere growth ancient nest, it would be enough for Luohan Dao Ancestor to come here.

But this time it was different, so those existences at the peak of the Nine Ancestors were also alarmed.

Ye Tian stayed in the Hanhai Yellow Building, waiting for news.

Soon, he got some news from the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

"Landlord, are you saying that it was a transformation-level ninefold peak ancestor primordial ancient artifact that mutilated its body, strengthened the growth ancient nest, and also carried a ball of black blood, making the growth ancient nest expand wildly?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Yes!" Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor nodded, "This is the news I got from the Arhat Dao Ancestor, that's why it caused so many Ninefold Origin Ancestors to come, because this matter is too serious, this kind of thing has never happened in the past!"

"Lord, that arm feels like the arm of some kind of creature, it doesn't look like a primordial antiquity! even if it's a primordial artifact like a primitive ancient, which is very similar to a humanoid cultivator, the body is not flesh and blood!"

Ye Tian asked with some doubts.

"Then it's about the Transformation!" the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor explained, "Ordinary primordial artifacts look like just objects, such as stones, weapons, trees, etc., which are completely different from cultivators. Moreover, the general primordial antiquities did not yet have a will, and all actions followed instinct. But once it reaches the Ninefold Ancestor level, the Primordial Artifact will turn into a substance, change its form, and not only will it have an incomparably strong will, but it will also have a very high intelligence, and it will turn into a body that is most suitable for battle. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood what a chemical substance was at this moment.

However, he still didn't understand why such beings had to expand their self-mutilated bodies into the Growing Nest.

However, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor didn't understand either.

"Landlord, what are the peak powerhouses of our Ninefold Ancestral Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building going to do?

Ye Tian asked again.

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor shook his head, "No, although the peak powerhouses of the Nine Fold Origin Ancestors can still shatter the Growing Ancient Nest, if they do it, the impact will be too great." And once it is really broken, the passage formed will be too large, and when the time comes, it will connect to the Primordial Ancient Sea, and if the passage cannot be closed for a long time, an even more terrible war will break out. If this is the purpose of the Primordial Ancient Sea, wouldn't we be fooled?"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, feeling that what the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said made sense.

However, this matter is something that the Ninefold Ancestor needs to worry about, he is only the Sevenfold Ancestor, and it makes no sense for him to worry.

In the years that followed, countless Sevenfold Ancestors were waiting at the boundary of the Hanhai Region, still not daring to enter the Growing Ancient Nest.

As the growing nest continued to expand, it finally covered the two ends of the area that cut off the Black Mountain, and even spread to the nearby community boundary.

On this day, a small community boundary was covered by a growing ancient nest, and except for those Dao Ancestors and a small number of living beings, all other living beings were devoured.

At this time, Ye Tian also began to worry that if the Growth Ancient Nest continued to expand, one day it would cover the boundary of the Primeval Plains!

After all, the primeval realm realm was his hometown, and he naturally didn't want such an end to the primeval realm realm.

But if it was really unavoidable, he could only move the human race from the boundary of the primeval plains, and also move his former friends and forces away.

"The Nine-Story Building shouldn't allow this Growing Ancient Nest to expand forever, right?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Nine-story building.

A group of Ninefold Primordial Ancestors were having a meeting to discuss the matter of the Growing Ancient Nest in the Hanhai District.

Previously, they had been exploring for a long time, and they had also used many treasures to spy on the growing nest to no avail.

Not only them, but also Shidaoshan and other forces did not investigate it.

But as the Growing Nest grows, the Growing Nest grows stronger and stronger, and it's not good to go on like this.

At this time, the True Water Dao Ancestor at the peak of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, one of the elders of the Nine-Story Building Headquarters, spoke.

"According to our inference, the black blood carried by the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor Peak Primordial Ancient Artifact in the Primordial Ancient Sea should be the blood of the Primordial Ancient Beast of the Space-Time Ancestral Beast, which is known as the Primordial Artifact of the Ninefold Ancestral Ancestor with the strongest life-saving Primordial Antiquity, such blood is of high value, which can make the Growing Ancient Nest continue to evolve and improve, and can also improve the life level of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor. If a Ninefold Ancestor with a life level of 99 had condensed a Ninefold Life Dao Flower, then with the help of the blood of the Space-Time Ancestral Beast, he could easily step into the 100 Life Level. Such a good thing is worth many times more than a growing nest!"

True Water Daozu said.

The other Ninefold Primordial Ancestors also nodded their heads, agreeing with this inference, and also believing that it was the blood of the Space-Time Ancestral Beast.

"I have to send a Dao Ancestor into the Primordial Ancient Sea to understand the situation, I suspect that something happened over there, otherwise this situation would not have happened!"

Luohan Daozu proposed.

True Water Dao Ancestor nodded: "I also think that send a Dao Ancestor over to investigate, but who to send over? The ordinary Ninefold Origin Ancestor is easy to be discovered, so it will be difficult to come back!"

At this time, a Dao Ancestor proposed: "Please go over to the Secret Dao Ancestor, he has the strongest ability to save his life, and he is also good at hiding, he once sneaked into the Primordial Ancient Sea and successfully returned." Now, he has also cultivated to the peak realm of the Nine Primordial Ancestors, and his strength is unfathomable, if he goes, the success rate will be very high!"

True Water Dao Ancestor nodded slightly: "The Dark Dao Ancestor is indeed very suitable, he is now in retreat and cultivation, let me go and invite him!"

Subsequently, many Dao Ancestors discussed for a while and then ended the meeting.

Then, the True Water Dao Ancestor contacted the Dark Dao Ancestor.

The Mysterious Dao Ancestor was out of the customs, and agreed to the request of the True Water Dao Ancestor, preparing to go to the Primordial Ancient Sea.

After a period of time, the Mysterious Dao Ancestor returned from the Primordial Ancient Sea at a heavy cost, and brought back a very important piece of information.

This information made the Nine Buildings completely understand why those primordial antiquities were crazy to cultivate a growing ancient nest.
